name: Euro Manganese Inc.
description: Euro Manganese Inc. is a waste-recycling company whose principal activity is the evaluation and development of the Chvaletice Manganese Project in the Czech Republic. The Project entails re-processing historic mine tailings to produce high-purity manganese products, primarily for the electric vehicle battery industry. The company is focused on becoming a leading, competitive, and environmentally superior producer of ultra-high-purity manganese.
